title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Behavior Brief: Object Integrity
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js object integrity increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply preventExtensions, seal, freeze, or immutable update patterns at deliberate ownership boundaries.
Use data or accessor descriptors and explain writable, enumerable, and configurable constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Defend the Object Integrity model

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Apply preventExtensions, seal, freeze, or immutable update patterns at deliberate ownership boundaries.
